Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Elder Rahm]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — Elder Rahm has supervised the Elder Treasure Hall for forty years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — Elder Rahm is a Heaven's Glory elder who forged the cases in the Lesser Treasure Hall and possesses countermeasures for broken cases.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — Elder Rahm has constructs hovering over each shoulder and a weapon in hand.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Elder Rahm is the keeper of the Heaven’s Glory School’s Lesser Treasure Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Elder Rahm is a Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Elder Rahm expressed pity for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Elder Rahm threatened that his Remnant would act if he were killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Elder Rahm stood behind Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Rahm is an Elder who previously had a battle that destroyed much of the interior of the Lesser Treasure Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Elder Rahm is an Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Elder Rahm refuses to bow to Eithan.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
